apps.title: Badeel Vendor Portal
apps.description: Badeel Vendor Portal - vendor onboarding and invoicing

api.name: badeel-main-nep-api
api.description: GET APIs backing the badeel_main_nep app, replacing its hardcoded frontend data

dictionary.name: nep_purchase_order
dictionary.description: badeel_main_nep - purchase order master catalog with line items (drives Completion Requests, CoCs, Invoices)

dictionary.name: nep_vendor_invitation
dictionary.description: badeel_main_nep - vendor invitation log (Home admin activity widget + Invite Vendors recent invites list)

dictionary.name: nep_completion_request
dictionary.description: badeel_main_nep - completion requests (vendor request for acceptance of delivered work against a PO)

dictionary.name: nep_lookup
dictionary.description: badeel_main_nep - generic lookup values (countries, currencies, payment terms, attachment types, contact titles, document types)

dictionary.name: nep_certificate_of_completion
dictionary.description: badeel_main_nep - Certificates of Completion (CoC) issued once a Completion Request is accepted

dictionary.name: purchase_order
dictionary.description: Badeel Vendor Portal - purchase orders vendors can invoice against

dictionary.name: nep_vendor_bank
dictionary.description: badeel_main_nep - vendor bank accounts (Qualification profile bank details)

dictionary.name: nep_invoice
dictionary.description: badeel_main_nep - vendor invoices against purchase orders (Invoice List/Detail, Home widget)

dictionary.name: nep_vendor
dictionary.description: badeel_main_nep - vendor master profile (Vendors list/detail, Qualification profile)

dictionary.name: invoice
dictionary.description: Badeel Vendor Portal - vendor invoices against purchase orders

dictionary.name: vendor
dictionary.description: Badeel Vendor Portal - vendor master + onboarding/qualification state

jsclass.name: nep_get_invoices
jsclass.description: GET /api/nep/invoices — full vendor invoice list with lines/attachments, for Invoice List/Detail and Home widget

jsclass.name: nep_get_vendor_documents
jsclass.description: GET /api/nep/vendor-documents — vendor qualification documents. Optional query param: vendorCompany (omit to list all)

jsclass.name: nep_get_lookups
jsclass.description: GET /api/nep/lookups — countries, tax countries, currencies, payment terms, attachment types, contact titles, document types

jsclass.name: nep_get_vendor_invitations
jsclass.description: GET /api/nep/vendor-invitations — Home admin activity widget + Invite Vendors recent invites list. Optional query param: limit

jsclass.name: nep_get_purchase_orders
jsclass.description: GET /api/nep/purchase-orders — raw PO master catalog with line items, for Completion Request PO picker and PO detail dialog

jsclass.name: nep_get_completion_requests
jsclass.description: GET /api/nep/completion-requests — full completion request list with lines/attachments

jsclass.name: nep_seed_data
jsclass.description: One-time idempotent seed of mock data for all badeel_main_nep backend tables

jsclass.name: nep_get_invoice_purchase_orders
jsclass.description: GET /api/nep/invoice-purchase-orders — POs eligible for invoicing (have at least one Approved CoC), with computed poValue/remaining/cocCount, for the Create Invoice wizard step 1

jsclass.name: nep_get_vendors
jsclass.description: GET /api/nep/vendors — vendor master list with categories/locations, for Vendors list + detail screens

jsclass.name: nep_get_vendor_bank_accounts
jsclass.description: GET /api/nep/vendor-bank-accounts — vendor qualification profile bank details. Optional query param: vendorCompany

jsclass.name: nep_get_certificates_of_completion
jsclass.description: GET /api/nep/coc-list — Certificates of Completion with lines/attachments. Defaults to Approved only (matches vendor CoC screen); pass status=all for every status, or status=<value> to filter

jsclass.name: nep_get_kpi_data
jsclass.description: GET /api/nep/kpi-data — Home dashboard KPI tile counts, computed from the live tables

jsscript_group.name: BadeelMainNEP
jsscript_group.description: Backend server scripts for the badeel_main_nep app (seed data + GET APIs) in POC_Badeel

jsscript_group.name: Vendor Portal
jsscript_group.description: Badeel Vendor Portal - server scripts backing the App Designer app and vendor-portal-api
